fv3_d_to_c_xi.accuracy: O(h^2) (two-point centered average across the ξ-edge)
fv3_d_to_c_xi.reference: Harris et al. (2021), GFDL FV3 Technical Memorandum, §6; src/operators/wind_ops.jl `dgrid_to_cgrid` step 4 (imperative reference).
fv3_d_to_c_xi.notes: Final A→C interpolation step of the D→C grid algorithm: average the cell-center contravariant ξ-wind ũ from the two cells flanking a ξ-constant face. Inputs are A-grid contravariant winds at cell centers (output of the covariant→contravariant transform followed by ghost extension with vector rotation — `src/ghost_cells.jl::extend_with_ghosts_vector`). Cross-panel ghost extension lives in the grid accessor; selectors carry no `panel` field.
